kirundi.identify_3_structures_in_the_spotter_t: Menya imiterere 3 mu Kizamini ca Spotter
kirundi.unlock_3_anatomical_mnemonics: Ugurura ibimenyetso 3 vyo kwibuka vya anatomi
kirundi.206_bones_support_protection_movement_: Amagufa 206 — gushigikira, kurinda, kwimuka, kubika amabuye y'agaciro, gukora amaraso.
kirundi.houses_meninges_brain_and_cranial_nerv: Irimwo meninges, ubwonko, n'utwobo tw'imyakura y'igihanga. Imisono (coronal, sagittal, lambdoid) irahurira igihe umwana agize imyaka 2.
kirundi.600_muscles_movement_posture_heat_prod: Imitsi 600+ — kwimuka, uko umuntu ahagaze, gukora ubushuhe, guhamya ingingo.
kirundi.lightest_sleep_transition_from_wakeful: Ibitotsi vyoroshe cane — guhinduka uva mu kuba maso. Kunyeganyega gahoro kw'amaso, imbaraga z'imitsi zigabanuka. Guhinda kwa hypnic (kunyeganyega kwa myoclonic) birasanzwe. Vyoroshe gukanguka. Imiraba ya vertex ikarishe igaragara kuri EEG.
kirundi.true_sleep_begins_core_body_temperatur: Ibitotsi nyavyo bitangira. Ubushuhe bwo hagati bw'umubiri buragabanuka, imikubitire y'umutima igabanuka. Sleep spindles (guturika kwa thalamocortical) birinda ibitotsi kandi bikahamya kwibuka kwo kwimuka. K-complexes ni imiraba minini yitabira ibimenyetso vyo hanze.
kirundi.deep_slow_wave_sleep_sws_most_restorat: Ibitotsi vyimbitse/vy'umuraba gahoro (SWS). Iciciro gisubiza imbaraga cane. Gusohora hormone y'imikurire bigera hejuru. Sisitemu ya glymphatic isukura imyanda y'ubwonko (amyloid-β). Guhamya kwibuka gutangaza biba. Bigoye cane gukanguka; ubunebwe bw'ibitotsi iyo ukanguwe.
kirundi.dreaming_stage_brain_is_highly_active_: Iciciro c'inzozi. Ubwonko burakora cane (nk'ukuba maso) ariko umubiri urakumira (atonia binyuze mu kubuza kw'igihuru c'ubwonko imyakura yo kwimuka). Kunyeganyega vuba kw'amaso guhuza. Gutunganya kwibuka kw'amarangamutima no gukemura ibibazo mu buhanga. Ibihe birekurura mu ijoro.
kirundi.brodmann_areas_map_52_cytoarchitectura: Uturere twa Brodmann tugaragaza uturere 52 tw'imiterere y'ingirabuzimafatizo. Igikonoshwa c'ibanze co kwimuka (agace 4), igikonoshwa c'ibanze c'ivyiyumviro vy'umubiri (utuce 3,1,2), igikonoshwa c'ibanze co kubona (agace 17), igikonoshwa c'ibanze co kumva (utuce 41,42). Igikonoshwa ca prefrontal ni co ca nyuma kubona myelin (~imyaka 25).
kirundi.purkinje_cells_are_among_the_largest_n: Ingirabuzimafatizo za Purkinje ziri mu myakura minini cane, buri imwe yakira nka 200,000 z'inyunge za synaptic. Igikonoshwa ca cerebellar gifite ivyiciro 3: molecular, Purkinje, granular. Ubushakashatsi bushasha bwerekana uruhare rwavyo mu kumva, amarangamutima, n'ururimi.
kirundi.brainstem_midbrain_pons_medulla: Igihuru c'Ubwonko (Ubwonko bwo Hagati, Pons, Medulla)
kirundi.contains_nuclei_for_cranial_nerves_iii: Kirimwo nuclei z'imyakura y'igihanga III–XII. Sisitemu ya reticular activating (RAS) ni "buto yo gucana" y'ubwonko — kwangirika bitera koma. Kwambuka kwa piramide muri medulla: kwambuka kwo kwimuka bisigura kugenzura kwo kwimuka kw'uruhande runyuranye.
kirundi.memory_replay_during_sleep_hippocampal: Gusubiramwo kwibuka mu gihe c'ibitotsi: imyakura ya hippocampal "isubiramwo" ivyabaye ku manywa mu bitotsi vya N3, yimura kwibuka kuri neocortex. Ingirabuzimafatizo za grid mu gikonoshwa ca entorhinal zitanga ibipimo vy'umwanya ku ngirabuzimafatizo z'ahantu za hippocampal.
kirundi.fear_conditioning_pathway_auditory_cor: Inzira yo kwigisha ubwoba: igikonoshwa co kumva → amygdala y'uruhande → amygdala yo hagati → hypothalamus (igisubizo c'umuhangayiko) + PAG (guhagarara). Imikoranire ya amygdala-prefrontal itanga uburyo bwo kugenzura amarangamutima — urufatiro rw'ubuvuzi bwa CBT.
kirundi.key_nuclei_vpl_vpm_somatosensory_relay: Nuclei z'ingenzi: VPL/VPM (koherereza ivyiyumviro vy'umubiri), LGN (koherereza kubona kuri V1), MGN (koherereza kumva kuri A1), pulvinar (kwitondera), itsinda rya nuclei ryo imbere (kwibuka, uruziga rwa Papez).
kirundi.thermostat_analogy_anterior_hypothalam: Ingero ya thermostat: hypothalamus yo imbere itera gukonja (kwaguka kw'imitsi, kubira ivyuya); hypothalamus yo inyuma itera gushuha (guhinda umushitsi, guhina imitsi). Umuriro = urwego rwazamuwe na prostaglandins ziturutse ku ndwara.
kirundi.split_brain_experiments_revealed_hemis: Ubushakashatsi bwo kugabanya ubwonko bwagaragaje ubuhanga bw'ibice: uruhande rw'ibumoso = ururimi, ubwenge; uruhande rw'iburyo = gutunganya umwanya, vyuzuye. Amakuru atangwa ku murima umwe wo kubona atunganywa n'uruhande runyuranye.
kirundi.dopamine_from_substantia_nigra_modulat: Dopamine iva muri substantia nigra igenzura inzira ziziguye (D1, ihagurutsa) n'izitaziguye (D2, ibuza). Gutakaza iki kugenzura muri Parkinson bitera ingorane zihariye zo gutangura kwimuka.
kirundi.returns_interstitial_fluid_absorbs_die: Isubiza amazi yo hagati y'ingirabuzimafatizo, inyunyuza ibinure vy'ibiryo, kurinda umubiri — utubunda twa lymph 600–700, thymus, spleen.
kirundi.skin_largest_organ_2m_hair_nails_gland: Uruhu (ingingo nini kurusha izindi, ~2m²), umusatsi, inzara, glande — inzitizi, kugenzura ubushuhe, kumva, gukora vitamine D.
kirundi.hormone_producing_glands_regulate_meta: Glande zikora hormone — zigenzura metabolism, imikurire, kuvyara, umuhangayiko, homeostasis binyuze mu ntumwa za chimique.
kirundi.motor_neurons_from_the_nervous_system_: Imyakura yo kwimuka iva muri sisitemu y'imyakura isohora acetylcholine aho umwakura n'umutsi bihurira, itera guhina kw'ubwoya bw'umutsi. Nta bimenyetso vy'imyakura, imitsi ntishobora kwimuka.
kirundi.the_hypothalamus_bridges_the_nervous_a: Hypothalamus ihuza sisitemu y'imyakura na endocrine — ihuza ibimenyetso vy'imyakura ikabihindura amabwiriza ya hormone agenzura glande ya pituitary n'urukurikirane rwose rwa hormone ruri munsi yayo.
kirundi.the_diaphragm_and_intercostal_muscles_: Diaphragm n'imitsi yo hagati y'imbavu vyaguka bikanahina umwobo w'igituza mu buryo bw'umubiri kugira ngo vyimure umwuka. Ibihaha ntibifite umutsi wavyo bwite kandi vyishingikiriza rwose ku mitsi ikikije.
kirundi.the_skin_contains_millions_of_speciali: Uruhu rurimo miliyoni z'impera z'imyakura zihariye n'ivyakira bipfundikijwe bimenya gukorwaho, igitutu, ubushuhe, n'ububabare, bihora bitanga amakuru y'ivyiyumviro kuri sisitemu y'imyakura.
kirundi.which_structure_is_most_likely_affecte: Ni iyihe miterere ishoboka cane kwibasirwa?
kirundi.patellofemoral_pain_syndrome_occurs_wh: Indwara y'ububabare bwa patellofemoral iba iyo igufwa ry'ivi ridatembera neza mu muferege waryo ku gufwa ry'itako. Igitutu gisubiramo kiva mu kwiruka gitera kubabara kwa cartilage. Ubuvuzi burimo kubandanya quad, guhamya urukiro, no guhindura ibikorwa.
kirundi.which_structure_is_most_likely_torn: Ni iyihe miterere ishoboka cane gutabuka?
kirundi.the_supraspinatus_is_the_most_commonly: Supraspinatus ni umutsi wa rotator cuff utabuka cane. Unyura munsi ya acromion aho uhura n'igitutu no gutabuka. Akazi ko hejuru y'umutwe nko gusiga irangi kongera iki kaga cane.
kirundi.the_sa_node_in_the_right_atrium_is_the: SA node iri mu atrium y'iburyo ni pacemaker karemano y'umutima. Mu gihe co kwimenyereza umubiri gukomeye, adrenaline ishobora gutera imikubitire itagira ingaruka mbi mu gihe imikubitire y'umutima ihindagurika. Arrhythmias zibandanya zigomba gusuzumwa kugira ngo hakurweho indwara y'umutima y'imiterere.
kirundi.carpal_tunnel_syndrome_is_compression_: Indwara ya carpal tunnel ni ukwandamizwa kw'umwakura wa median munsi ya flexor retinaculum ku ijoro ry'ukuboko. Umwakura wa median utanga ivyiyumviro ku rutoki runini n'intoki 3.5 za mbere. Gukoresha ijoro ry'ukuboko kenshi ni impamvu ikomeye y'akaga.
kirundi.what_diagnosis_must_be_urgently_ruled_: Ni iyihe ndwara igomba gukurwaho vyihutirwa?
kirundi.painless_lymphadenopathy_with_b_sympto: Kuvyimba kw'utubunda twa lymph bidababaza, hamwe n'ibimenyetso vya B (ivyuya vy'ijoro, gutakaza ibiro, umuriro) ni ikimenyetso gisanzwe ca Hodgkin lymphoma ku basore. Biopsy yerekana ingirabuzimafatizo za Reed-Sternberg yemeza isuzuma.
kirundi.without_insulin_from_beta_cells_glucos: Nta insuline iva mu ngirabuzimafatizo beta, glucose ntishobora kwinjira mu ngirabuzimafatizo. Umubiri utwika ibinure, ukora ketones zituma amaraso aba acide. Guhumeka kwa Kussmaul kwishura mu gusohora CO2. Ubuvuzi: amazi ya IV, insuline drip, no gusimbura electrolyte.
kirundi.why_is_the_middle_third_of_the_clavicl: Kuki igice ca gatatu co hagati ca clavicle ari aho havunika cane?
kirundi.the_middle_third_is_thinnest_and_has_n: Igice ca gatatu co hagati ni co gito kandi nta kubandanya kw'imitsi
kirundi.the_clavicle_is_the_most_frequently_fr: Clavicle ni igufwa rivunika kenshi. Igice caryo ca gatatu co hagati ni co gito kandi nta kurinda kw'imitsi. Imbaraga ziva mu kugwa ku kuboko kwagurutswe zikusanyirizwa kuri iki gice gifite intege nke. Vyinshi bikira binyuze mu guhambira ukuboko.
kirundi.why_does_altitude_cause_these_symptoms: Kuki ubutumburuke butera ibi bimenyetso, kandi ni iyihe miterere ihura n'igitutu cane?
kirundi.at_high_altitude_atmospheric_pressure_: Ku butumburuke buhanitse, igitutu c'ikirere kiragabanuka, kigabanya igitutu c'igice ca ogisijeni. Ogisijeni nke inyura mu ruhu rwa alveoli. Umubiri wishura mu guhumeka vuba no cane, wongera akazi k'imitsi yo guhumeka.
kirundi.the_right_ventricle_ejects_blood_throu: Ventricle y'iburyo isohora amaraso binyuze muri valve ya pulmonary muri imitsi ya pulmonary ku bihaha vyombi.
kirundi.blood_passes_through_the_mitral_valve_: Amaraso anyura muri valve ya mitral yinjira mu ventricle y'ibumoso ifite imitsi, icumba gikomeye kurusha ibindi c'umutima.
kirundi.air_enters_through_the_nostrils_and_is: Umwuka winjira binyuze mu mwenge w'izuru maze ushushwa, ukanywebwa amazi, ukayungururwa binyuze mu ruhu rw'imyanda na turbinates.
kirundi.300_million_grape_like_sacs_where_gas_: Utubuto miliyoni 300 tumeze nk'inzabibu aho guhererekanya gaze biba. O2 ikwira mu maraso; CO2 ikwira hanze. Ubuso bungana n'ikibuga ca tennis.
kirundi.teeth_mechanically_break_food_down_sal: Amenyo amena ibiryo mu buryo bw'imashini. Amylase y'amacandwe itangura kugogora amidon. Ururimi rukora ibiryo bikaba bolus.
kirundi.most_nutrient_absorption_occurs_here_v: Kunyunyuza intungamubiri kwinshi biba hano binyuze muri villi na microvilli, vyongera ubuso inshuro 600. Uburebure bwa metero 6-7.
kirundi.water_and_electrolytes_are_reabsorbed_: Amazi na electrolytes binyunyuzwa bundi bushasha. Bagiteri z'amara zibora fibre isigaye, zikora vitamine K na B12.
kirundi.waste_is_compacted_and_stored_in_the_r: Imyanda ikandamizwa ikabikwa muri rectum kugeza igihe co kwituma. Urugendo rwose rufata amasaha 24-72.
kirundi.a_sensory_receptor_in_the_skin_detects: Uwakira ivyiyumviro mu ruhu (nko gukoraho ku buso bushushe) amenya intandaro y'ububabare akakora ikimenyetso c'amashanyarazi.
kirundi.the_signal_travels_along_a_sensory_aff: Ikimenyetso kigenda ku mwakura w'ivyiyumviro (afférent) kugeza ku ruti rw'umugongo ku muvuduko ugera kuri 120 m/s binyuze mu kohereza saltatoire.
kirundi.in_the_dorsal_horn_the_sensory_neuron_: Mu ihembe ryo hepfo, umwakura w'ivyiyumviro ukora synapse na interneuron. Ku baréflexe, ikimenyetso ntikigomba kugera ku bwonko.
kirundi.the_interneuron_in_the_spinal_gray_mat: Interneuron mu kintu c'ivu c'uruti rw'umugongo uhuza ikimenyetso ukakigeza ku mwakura wo kwimuka.
kirundi.the_motor_efferent_neuron_carries_the_: Umwakura wo kwimuka (efférent) utwara ikimenyetso c'itegeko uhereye ku ihembe ryo imbere kugeza ku mutsi ugenewe.
kirundi.meanwhile_a_copy_of_the_signal_ascends: Muri ico gihe, kopi y'ikimenyetso izamuka ku gikonoshwa c'ivyiyumviro vy'umubiri. Wumva ububabare mu bwenge nyuma ya segonda 0.5 nyuma ya réflexe.
kirundi.sorry_i_could_not_connect_to_the_ai_tu: Ihangane, sinashoboye guhuza n'umwigisha wa AI ubu.
kirundi.ai_tutor_is_not_available_in_this_envi: Umwigisha wa AI ntaboneka muri iki gihe.
kirundi.click_any_organ_to_see_its_structure_f: Fyonda ku ngingo iyo ari yo yose kugira ngo urabe imiterere yayo, imikorere yayo, n'aho ihuriye. Shira hejuru kugira ngo ubone ibirango vyoroshe; fyonda kugira ngo ubone ibisobanuro birambuye.
kirundi.step_through_each_major_part_in_pedago: Nyura mu buri gice kinini mu buryo bwo kwigisha. Inzira nziza cane ku bigira bwa mbere — ihuza imiterere → imikorere → guhuza mu kurebamo rimwe.
kirundi.no_system_works_alone_the_kidney_filte: Nta sisitemu ikora yonyine. Impyiko iyungurura amaraso (umutima n'imitsi), isubiza ADH (endocrine), isohora urée (igicuruzwa co kugogora). Shaka amahuriro.
kirundi.ask_a_question_about_the_active_organ_: Baza ikibazo ku ngingo canke sisitemu ikora. Umwigisha azi ibiri ku mugaragaza kandi ahuza ibisubizo n'urwego rwawe rw'ishure.
kirundi.click_the_named_structure_on_the_diagr: Fyonda ku miterere yiswe ku ishusho. Yubaka akamenyero ko gufyonda-ikintu ibizamini vya AP n'iby'ubuvuzi vyishingikirizaho.
kirundi.follow_blood_air_food_or_signals_throu: Kurikira amaraso, umwuka, ibiryo, canke ibimenyetso mu mubiri ku murongo. Inzira ni uburyo ukuri gutandukanye kuba sisitemu ushobora kwiyumvira.
kirundi.quick_recall_cards_with_spaced_repetit: Amakarita yo kwibuka vuba afite gusubiramwo mu ntera. Isuzuma ry'amasegonda atandatu ubu riruta gusoma bundi bushasha iminota itanu ejo — iyo ni ingaruka yo kwipimisha.
kirundi.adjust_the_sliders_to_keep_each_body_v: Hindura ba-slider kugira ngo buri mpinduka y'umubiri ibe mu rwego rwayo rwiza, kandi urabe uko sisitemu zikorana kugira ngo zibungabunge uburinganire.
kirundi.reset_all_layers_to_default_skin_only: Subiza ivyiciro vyose ku ntanguriro (uruhu gusa)
kirundi.which_body_system_contains_this_struct: Ni iyihe sisitemu y'umubiri irimwo iyi miterere?
kirundi.ask_a_question_about_anatomy_to_get_st: Baza ikibazo kuri anatomi kugira ngo utangure!
kirundi.ask_the_anatomy_ai_tutor_a_question: Baza umwigisha wa anatomi wa AI ikibazo
kirundi.a_pin_is_placed_on_the_anatomical_figu: Pini ishizwe ku ishusho ya anatomi. Menya imiterere vuba uko ushoboye! Shaka crosshair ikubita kuri canvas.
kirundi.what_structure_is_marked_on_the_figure: Ni iyihe miterere yashizweho ikimenyetso ku ishusho?
kirundi.trace_step_by_step_how_blood_flows_air: Kurikira intambwe ku ntambwe uko amaraso atemba, umwuka ugenda, ibiryo bigogorwa, canke ibimenyetso vy'imyakura bigenda mu mubiri.
kirundi.all_vital_signs_within_physiologic_ran: Ibimenyetso vy'ingenzi vyose biri mu rwego rw'umubiri.
kirundi.compensatory_mechanisms_activated_body: Uburyo bwo kwishura bwatangiye. Umubiri usubiza inzego.
kirundi.acid_base_glucose_thermal_disturbance_: Ihungabana rya acide-base + glucose + ubushuhe biruta kwishura.
kirundi.hypothesis_free_text_which_vital_sign_: Iciyumviro (inyandiko yigenga): Ni ikihe kimenyetso c'ingenzi cihanganira ihindagurika rito cane?
kirundi.hold_two_vital_signs_steady_move_the_t: Fata ibimenyetso bibiri vy'ingenzi bihamye. Nyeganyeza ica gatatu. Raba.
kirundi.real_human_ph_range_is_7_35_7_45_inves: Urwego rwa pH y'umuntu nyawe ni 7.35-7.45. Shakashaka impamvu ari rwiza cane.
kirundi.explain_why_homeostasis_is_fragile_to_: Sigura impamvu homeostasis yoroshe ku ihindagurika ry'impinduka nyinshi.
kirundi.design_note_discrete_4_state_vital_mar: Inyandiko y'igishushanyo: ikimenyetso c'ingenzi c'imimerere 4 itandukanye; nta manota y'ivuriro; nta kwerekana — ku bushake.
